hero.title: Cloud-Native Payments
hero.description: A resilient, multi-region payment processor built for zero-downtime scale.

narrative.label: The Mission
content: Building a resilient, multi-region payment processor handling $2B+ in annual volume with zero downtime requirements.

narrative.label: Key Achievement
content: 99.999% Availability achieved during the peak holiday season with 10x traffic spike.

hero.title: Distributed Ledger Engine
hero.description: A high-throughput consensus engine for private enterprise networks.

narrative.label: The Challenge
content: Developing a high-throughput consensus mechanism for private enterprise networks.

narrative.label: The Result
content: Reduced transaction latency by 400ms while maintaining strict causal ordering across 50 nodes.

hero.title: Edge Security Mesh
hero.description: Zero Trust data protection at the network edge for a global fleet.

narrative.label: The Problem
content: Securing sensitive data flows at the network edge for a global logistics fleet.

narrative.label: The Solution
content: Implemented a Zero Trust architecture using eBPF for deep packet inspection with minimal overhead.

archive.title: Real-time Analytics Engine
archive.description: A low-latency pipeline ingesting 1M events/sec, cutting compute costs 85% by moving heavy processing from Python to Rust.
narrative: Designed a low-latency ingestion path handling one million events per second with backpressure and exactly-once semantics.
Migrated the heaviest processing stages from Python to Rust, cutting compute costs by 85% while tightening tail latencies.

archive.title: ML Model Orchestrator
archive.description: Automated deployment and monitoring for 500+ micro-models, standardizing the MLOps pipeline and cutting deploy time from days to minutes.
narrative: Automated the full lifecycle — build, deploy, and monitoring — for a fleet of over 500 production micro-models.
Standardized the MLOps pipeline behind a golden path, collapsing deployment time from days to minutes.

archive.title: Core Banking API Gateway
archive.description: Modernized legacy SOAP interfaces into a single GraphQL gateway, unifying 15 services with strict rate limiting.
narrative: Wrapped fifteen legacy SOAP services behind a single GraphQL gateway with schema-first contracts.
Added strict, per-consumer rate limiting and observability so mobile clients could adopt new capabilities safely.
